Ancient Botanicals

The Healing Roots

Gurkhalil

Terminalia chebula

The king of herbs — powerful antioxidant and detoxifier known to support joint health.

Kali Erai

Piper longum

Long pepper root with bioavailability-enhancing properties that supercharge the formula.

Ashwagandha

Withania somnifera

The adaptogenic root that reduces cortisol, builds resilience, and supports joint tissue.

Rasna

Pluchea lanceolata

Ancient Vata-balancing herb traditionally used for arthritis and muscular disorders.

Our Philosophy

The Science of Balance

Our formulations follow the “Samyoga” principle — the precise combination of herbs that creates a synergistic effect greater than the sum of its parts. Every leaf is harvested at the peak of its potency, following the solar cycles of traditional Ayurveda.

100%

Plant Based

No synthetic compounds

Zero

Synthetic Additives

Pure botanical extracts

Vedic

Extraction Method

Ancient purification rites
